query: SELECT u.id, u.email, u.name, u.role, c.name as cohort_name, COUNT(DISTINCT r.id) as total_runs, COUNT(DISTINCT cert.id) as total_certs FROM users u LEFT JOIN cohorts c ON u.cohortId = c.id LEFT JOIN runs r ON u.id = r.userId LEFT JOIN certifications cert ON u.id = cert.userId WHERE u.email = 'jamesnns3@gmail.com' GROUP BY u.id;
